recommendations.description: Fix encryption type mismatches - rules check at-rest encryption instead of in-transit
recommendations.impact: CRITICAL - Rules will fail to validate TLS/SSL configuration correctly

recommendations.description: Fix type mismatch - change expected_value from string to list for 'in' operator
recommendations.impact: MEDIUM - Operator may fail or behave unexpectedly

critical_issues.description: Rule checks StorageEncrypted (at-rest encryption) instead of TLS/in-transit encryption fields
critical_issues.problem: Rule name indicates TLS in transit, but checks at-rest encryption field
critical_issues.impact: HIGH - Rule will fail to verify TLS/SSL configuration, potentially allowing unencrypted connections
critical_issues.recommendation: Replace StorageEncrypted check with TLS-related fields (may need to check cluster parameter groups)

critical_issues.description: Rule checks StorageEncrypted (at-rest encryption) instead of TLS/in-transit encryption fields
critical_issues.problem: Rule name indicates encryption in transit, but checks at-rest encryption field
critical_issues.impact: HIGH - Rule incorrectly validates encryption type, may pass when TLS is disabled
critical_issues.recommendation: Replace StorageEncrypted check with TLS-related fields (check cluster parameter groups for TLS configuration)

type_mismatches.description: Uses string value with 'in' operator (requires list)
type_mismatches.problem: 'in' operator requires expected_value to be a list, but got string

field_path_inconsistencies.description: Mixed use of field path patterns
field_path_inconsistencies.impact: Low-Medium - May work but inconsistent, could cause confusion
field_path_inconsistencies.recommendation: Standardize to one pattern based on response_path behavior

method_verification_issues.description: 3 instance rules use describe_db_clusters instead of describe_db_instances
method_verification_issues.recommendation: Verify if instance-level settings should use describe_db_instances method
